description_long: This is a modern main battle tank with a low-profile, angular hull and a long, prominent main cannon extending from a rotating turret. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, connected by a continuous track system, and a cylindrical external fuel drum mounted at the rear. The upper hull is equipped with various hatches, periscopes, and what appears to be a machine gun mount on the turret. The tank's exterior is finished in a dark, glossy blue color, with no visible camouflage or military markings. The armor plating appears thick and covers the entire body, with sloped surfaces for increased deflection and protection.
description: A dark blue, heavily armored main battle tank with a long cannon, six road wheels per side, and a rear-mounted fuel drum.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, six road wheels, and the cylindrical fuel drum at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tank's wide, sloped armor and the main cannon protruding directly forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the cannon, road wheels, and rear fuel drum, with more detail on the turret's top.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the cylindrical fuel drum and the back of the tank's hull, with visible engine grilles and exhausts.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret and one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid dark blue color.
